message:
test(agent-state): update tests to verify TERMINATING transitions from SPAWNING

Completes the test coverage for the TERMINATING transition additions:
- Verify getValidTransitions() now returns 3 targets for SPAWNING (was 2)
- Verify canTransitionTo(TERMINATING) returns true from SPAWNING
- Verify getValidTransitions() includes TERMINATING in the list

Both test suites updated:
- apps/gateway/src/__tests__/agent-state-machine.test.ts
- packages/shared/src/agent/__tests__/state.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
